blocks.text: Norway's Perfect Sunday: Masters, Paris-Roubaix and Ruud All Collide

Three iconic events, three Norwegian storylines. Hovland and Reitan chase Augusta history as Young and McIlroy share the Masters lead at -11 heading into the final round. Then cobblestones and clay beckon.
⚽ Villarreal at Athletic Club — La Liga's 3rd-place Villarreal face a ferocious Basque atmosphere
